text: The new anti-corruption and populist parties have finally started to succeed in Slovakia. Thus, the alternating of right and left wing coalition blocks came to an end. However, coalition negotiation and coalition agreements have not been a problem given the high degree of fragmentation and the large number of parties participating in the coalitions. The pattern of the rules and practices within the coalitions have stabilized within the framework of the Ministerial Government Model. While the main characteristics such as the coalition negotiations involving political party leaders and the conclusion of a public programme agreement for the coalition indicating the distribution of cabinet offices or assigning responsibility for areas in need of policy solution are the same as those in the previous two electoral cycles, the pandemic was also an exception in relation to the governance model established in the Slovak coalition government, when the prime minister has temporarily taken the full spotlight of politics and it has thus been hindered to move further towards the direction of coalition-based type of governance.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written

The pattern of the rules and practices within the coalitions have stabilized within the framework of the Ministerial Government Model. While the main characteristics such as the coalition negotiations involving political party leaders and the conclusion of a public programme agreement for the coalition indicating the distribution of cabinet offices or assigning responsibility for areas in need of policy solution are the same as those in the previous two electoral cycles, the pandemic was also an exception in relation to the governance model established in the Slovak coalition government, when the prime minister has temporarily taken the full spotlight of politics and it has thus been hindered to move further towards the direction of coalition-based type of governance.
